nasb.text: The Lord will not allow the righteous to hunger, But He will reject the craving of the wicked.

esv.text: The Lord does not let the righteous go hungry, but he thwarts the craving of the wicked.

cnv.text: 耶和華不容許義人忍受飢餓， 惡人的慾念卻無法得著。

ccb.text: 耶和华不让义人挨饿， 祂使恶人的奢望成空。

csbs.text: 耶和华不让义人挨饿， 却必拒绝恶人的欲求。
